diagrams.title: Quick Sort Recursion Tree - Balanced vs Unbalanced
diagrams.description: Shows two recursion trees: balanced partition (left) where each level has O(n) work and O(log n) depth = O(n log n); unbalanced (right) where depth is O(n) giving O(n²) worst case
elements: Left subtree: n/2 elements, Right subtree: n/2 elements (balanced) or 1 element (unbalanced)
Each node labeled with partition size
Depth indicators showing O(log n) vs O(n)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why worst-case occurs and understand time complexity differences between best/average/worst scenarios
